end end return(function(w,v,h,s,Q,A,N,x,L,k,B,i,o,m,O,R,g,Z,l,z,I)l,g,R,o,x,L,O,Z,z,I,B,i,m,k=function(w)local r,g=585974+-585973,w[433468-433467]while g do
